sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27398" key="diplw|de/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διπλ-ῳδέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n27398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">recur,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῶν διατόνων καθ᾽ ἕκαστον τετράχορδον διπλῳδουμένων</foreign> Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg027.perseus-grc1:p.93H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.93H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
